backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no functionality, as the application performs all text transformations client-side.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features: centered text input area, uppercase conversion button, lowercase conversion button, and clean modern design with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend files describing the main App component, global styles with OKLCH color system, Tailwind configuration, and empty useQueries hook.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes using monochromatic grays and blacks.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx, titled 'Case Converter Tool'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component implementing a case converter tool with textarea input, uppercase/lowercase conversion buttons, header with branding, and footer with attribution link.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook for managing backend actor instances with Internet Identity authentication, handling actor creation and query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity storage, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Intentionally empty file with comment explaining no backend queries are needed since all text transformations are client-side.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark modes, featuring monochromatic color palette and typography settings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point setting up QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and rendering the App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration with custom OKLCH color system, border radius variables, container settings, animations, and system font stack.
project_state.json: Project state file for a Case Converter Tool that transforms text between uppercase and lowercase using a simple single-page HTML/CSS/JavaScript application. Tracks four implemented features (text input area, uppercase/lowercase buttons, and modern design) with three pending feature requests.
